text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're excited to have you help keep our community safe and friendly!
Hi guide_sam! Welcome to the community! You've been approved as an event helper. We can't wait to see all the great events you'll help organize for our members!
Welcome newbie_kim! You've been approved as a community member. We're so glad you're here! Feel free to introduce yourself in the general chat and let us know if you have any questions.
Hello mentor_lina! Welcome to the community! You've been approved as a mentor. Our new members will greatly benefit from your experience and guidance. We're thrilled to have you join us!
